use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATMENT OF CHILDREN WITH CENTRAL PRECOCIOUS PUBERTY

indications.text:
SUPPRELIN LA (histrelin acetate) subcutaneous implant is indicated for the treatment of children with central
precocious puberty (CPP).
Children with CPP (neurogenic or idiopathic) have an early onset of secondary sexual characteristics (earlier
than 8 years of age in females and 9 years of age in m...
